mano_cua.result_summary: 媒体库文件上传功能失效。编辑器正常显示，左侧边栏 Media 图标可用，点击 Upload file 按钮后选择 PNG 文件，显示 Uploading [filename]... 通知后立即报错 Oops, something went wrong. We are unable to complete your operation this time。测试了 hero-dark.png 和 hero-light.png 两个文件，两次上传均失败。媒体库搜索上传文件名结果为 Could not find anything。确认为一致性 Bug，核心上传功能完全不可用。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Two separate upload attempts (hero-dark.png, hero-light.png) both failed with identical error: 'Oops, something went wrong'. Toast notification showed upload started then immediately errored. Media library search confirmed files were not added. Consistent reproduction of upload failure bug.
